visuals.title: Error Handling
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Secure Error Handling and Logging</text>
  
  <!-- Application Box -->
  <rect x="160" y="60" width="100" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Application
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Error Handler Box -->
  <rect x="160" y="150" width="100" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Error Handler
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Secure Log Box -->
  <rect x="160" y="240" width="100" height="60" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Secure Log
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Error Arrow -->
  <path d="M210 120 L210 150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Log Arrow -->
  <path d="M210 210 L210 240" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrowhead Definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  
  <!-- Error Labels -->
  <text x="250" y="135" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#D32F2F" opacity="0">
    Error Occurred
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="250" y="225" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#388E3C" opacity="0">
    Sanitized Log Entry
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Shield Icon -->
  <path d="M210 180 L215 190 L225 192 L218 200 L220 210 L210 205 L200 210 L202 200 L195 192 L205 190 Z" fill="#FFD700" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
</svg>
